productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Denim Black Wallet
description: Crafted for the urban style maven, this wallet from lino perros is a must have for those who love organizing their wallet space. Dimensions : 9 cm X 19 cm Three fold denim upper with stitch detailing A magnetic button flap to hold the wallet together Five pockets and a card holder space in each of the three folds One buttoned compartment on the side of the flap Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
